title: Newcomers who stood out in Nebraska football’s spring game
description: Nebraska football fans got their first glimpse of the 2026 team with the Huskers' spring game on Saturday, March 28. Matt Rhule and company were aggressive in the transfer portal, adding 16 players to their team along with 11 incoming freshmen.

title: We know only this
description: We know only this: More troops are being sent to the Middle East, missiles and drones are being fired back and forth, and people are dying.

title: Applewhite pleased with Jags’ scrimmage
description: South Alabama held its ninth practice of spring workouts and its first scrimmage of the spring Saturday at Hancock Whitney Stadium. Head coach Major Applewhite said he was pleased with the results but also emphasized there is more work that...

title: Teen stabbed to death during wedding clash in Delhi
